original_snippet_context: The Jornal do Commercio's stance towards the Convênio de Taubaté and its relationship with government figures.
relevant_quote: O Jornal do Commercio tem feito tremenda opposição ao Convênio do Taubaté, ao mesmo tempo que vive aos bajoujos com o sr. Nilo Peçanha, um dos fautores da-quelle accordo.
justification: While not explicitly discussing the Caixa de Conversão directly, the strong opposition to the Convênio de Taubaté, which included provisions for the Caixa, suggests an orthodox leaning, given that the Convênio was largely supported by those with expansionist views.
